privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Garcia. Incorrect Diagnosis to remove/edit: 'Essential Hypertension' (ICD-9 Code: 401). Correct Diagnosis to add: 'Secondary Hypertension' (ICD-9 Code: 405). The task must be completed within the OSCAR EMR web interface.
